title: omphalodes sempervirens
intro: Omphalodes sempervirens, also known as Navelwort or Alpine Navelwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the borage family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its alkaloids, which have a relaxing and antispasmodic effect on the muscles. The health benefits of Omphalodes sempervirens include its ability to ease nausea, reduce anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to alleviate symptoms of indigestion and other related disorders.
